settings.announcementBar: Free Shipping Above ₹1500 • Handcrafted with Pure Natural Ingredients

brandStory.label: Our Legacy
brandStory.heading: Purity Without Compromise
brandStory.body: Vanashri was born from a simple desire: to rediscover the pure, unadulterated scents of the Indian forest. In a world of synthetic clones, we choose the silence of nature and the authenticity of handmade craft.
brandStory.block1Body: What began in 2020 as a personal quest for non-toxic fragrance evolved into a mission to preserve the aromatic heritage of India. Every stick is handcrafted in small batches to ensure absolute quality.
brandStory.block2Body: From Kashmir saffron to Mysore sandalwood, we source directly from the origin. Lab-tested for purity — no charcoal, no synthetics, just pure nature.

items.name: Saffron
items.desc: Hand-picked from the alpine valleys of Pampore, our saffron brings a royal warmth to every blend.

items.name: Sandalwood
items.desc: The gold standard of aromatic woods, ethically sourced to ensure the survival of this ancient legacy.

items.name: Exotic Spices
items.desc: A blend of black cardamom and cinnamon that captures the vibrant spirit of the Eastern forests.

items.title: Lab Tested
items.desc: Every batch is tested for purity and non-toxicity in accredited laboratories.

items.title: Handmade
items.desc: Artisanal process that preserves the integrity of essential oils and botanicals.

items.title: Long Lasting
items.desc: Our incense sticks are designed to burn slowly, lasting up to 3 hours of fragrance.

items.title: Non-Toxic Smoke
items.desc: Zero charcoal, zero synthetic perfumes. Only pure resins and essential oils.

artisans.label: Our Community
artisans.heading: Handmade by Artisans
artisans.body: Every Vanashri product is a testament to human touch. We employ women from rural communities, empowering them through traditional crafts while preserving our shared heritage.
artisans.block1Body: 50+ women artisans are currently part of the Vanashri circle. By providing fair wages, flexible working hours, and a safe space, we help them achieve financial independence.
artisans.block2Body: Our process is entirely carbon-neutral. From solar-dried ingredients to FSC-certified packaging, we ensure growth does not come at the cost of the planet.

items.quote: The Mysore Sandalwood incense is unlike anything I've tried. It's subtle, sophisticated, and truly calming.
items.author: Priya M.

items.quote: The artisan soap feels incredibly premium. You can tell it's made with actual ingredients, not just chemicals.
items.author: Vikram S.

items.quote: Beautiful packaging and even more beautiful scents. A perfect gift for anyone who appreciates quality.
items.author: Sarah J.

aboutPage.heroBody: In every scent, we preserve a piece of history. Vanashri is more than a brand; it is a movement back to the purity of nature and the honesty of human craft.

footer.brandText: Natural fine fragrance goods made in India. Sourced from silence, crafted for peace. Every product is a piece of aromatic history.

legalPages.title: Privacy Policy
legalPages.content:
Last updated: May 2026

Vanashri ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

**Information We Collect**: We collect personal information you provide such as name, email address, phone number, shipping address, and payment details when you place an order or create an account.

**How We Use Your Information**: We use your information to process orders, communicate with you, improve our products and services, and send marketing communications (with your consent).

**Data Security**: We implement industry-standard security measures including SSL encryption to protect your personal data. Payment processing is handled through secure third-party gateways (Razorpay).

**Cookies**: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyse website traffic. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

**Third-Party Services**: We may share your data with trusted partners such as shipping providers (Delhivery), payment processors (Razorpay), and analytics services (Google Analytics) solely for order fulfilment and service improvement.

**Your Rights**: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us at privacy@vanashri.com for any requests.

This is a placeholder privacy policy. Please replace with your actual privacy policy drafted by a legal professional.

legalPages.title: Terms & Conditions
legalPages.content:
Last updated: May 2026

Welcome to Vanashri. By accessing and using our website, you agree to these Terms & Conditions.

**Products**: All products are handcrafted incense items. Product images are representative and may vary slightly. Prices are in Indian Rupees (INR) and include applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.

**Orders**: Orders are confirmed upon successful payment. We reserve the right to cancel orders due to stock unavailability, pricing errors, or suspected fraud.

**Shipping**: We ship across India. Delivery times are estimates and may vary. Free shipping is available on orders above ₹499.

**Payment**: We accept UPI payments through Razorpay. All transactions are processed securely.

**Intellectual Property**: All content on this website including logos, text, images, and designs are owned by Vanashri and protected under Indian copyright law.

**Limitation of Liability**: Vanashri shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products or website.

This is a placeholder terms document. Please replace with actual terms drafted by a legal professional.

legalPages.title: Refund Policy
legalPages.content:
Last updated: May 2026

**Return Window**: Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery for unused, sealed products only.

**Non-Returnable Items**: Opened or used incense products cannot be returned due to hygiene reasons. Gift sets with broken seals are also non-returnable.

**How to Initiate a Return**: Contact our support team at returns@vanashri.com or via WhatsApp with your order ID and reason for return.

**Refund Process**: Once we receive and inspect the returned product, refunds will be processed within 5–7 business days to your original payment method.

**Damaged Products**: If you receive a damaged product, contact us within 48 hours with photos. We will arrange a replacement or full refund at no additional cost.

**Cancellations**: Orders can be cancelled within 2 hours of placing them. Once shipped, cancellation is not possible — you may initiate a return after delivery.

This is a placeholder refund policy. Please replace with your actual policy drafted by a legal professional.
